text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
232 
RACE_ETHNCTY_EXP_CD 
LABEL: 
Expanded Race and Ethnicity Constructed Code — Latest in Year 
DESCRIPTION: A constructed variable that is an expanded code indicating the beneficiary’s race and ethnicity; most 
recent in the calendar and the two prior years. 
SHORT NAME: RACE_ETHNCTY_EXP_CD 
LONG NAME: RACE_ETHNCTY_EXP_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
3 
FILE(S): 
Annual
